overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy night in a historic Western town (Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2), featuring gas-lit cobblestone streets, wooden buildings with wrought-iron balconies, and occasional pedestrians and horse-drawn carriages. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with heavy rainfall and warm artificial lighting from street lamps.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a historic Western town, walking along a cobblestone street lined with two-story wooden buildings featuring wrought-iron balconies. Warm gas lamps illuminate the wet street, creating reflections on the cobblestones. The atmosphere is quiet and empty, with no other pedestrians visible.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more vegetated area with a wooden fence and large live oak trees on the left. A bearded pedestrian in period clothing walks past the camera. The street remains cobblestone and wet from the rain, with gas lamps continuing to provide the primary illumination.

segments.scene_description: The street opens up into a wider area with a parked wooden cart on the left. A horse-drawn carriage approaches from the distance and passes by on the right, pulled by a dark horse. The camera continues walking forward as the carriage moves past, with tall wooden buildings lining the right side.

segments.scene_description: The final segment features passing the 'J. Campbell Undertaker' building with its distinctive red facade and signage, followed by a general store with a wooden porch. The street continues with cobblestones and gas lighting, maintaining the rainy, atmospheric night setting as the walk progresses deeper into the town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy, gas-lit historic town that evolves from a quiet residential street into a more active commercial district. It begins along a deserted cobblestone road lined with two-story wooden buildings and wrought-iron balconies, where warm lamp light reflects off the wet ground. As the camera moves forward, the architecture gives way to a more vegetated area with large live oak trees and a wooden fence, passing a bearded pedestrian in period clothing. The scene then opens into a wider thoroughfare where a horse-drawn carriage approaches and passes by a parked wooden cart before the camera continues toward a row of tall buildings. Finally, the walk progresses deeper into the town, passing the red facade of the J. Campbell Undertaker and a general store with a wooden porch under the persistent rainfall.
